question: What does the Romanian idiom '{{ro-RO|A freca menta||a FRE-ka MEN-ta}}' most naturally mean?
correctAnswer: Waste time and avoid useful work.
incorrectAnswers: Talk endlessly without getting anywhere.
Try to fool people with a fake appearance.
Add fuel to the fire.
explanation: This idiom is used in everyday romanian for the idea 'Waste time and avoid useful work.'.
